title: Marksman 71Pc Micro Irrigation System 23M
features: Water your flower beds, hanging baskets, greenhouses, allotment etc
One turn of the tap is all it takes
description: 15 x support stake, 2 x straight pipe connector, 5 x end clamp, 1 x 3/4" Bsp outside tap adapter, 1 x flow control Valve, 10 x pipe clip, 1 x Filter washer, 10 x inline Dripper, 10 x end Dripper, 15 x 't' Shaped pipe connector, 1 x 23M (75') un-cut vinyl pipe, water your flower beds, hanging baskets, greenhouses, allotment etc. Makes watering your garden easier one turn of the tap is all it takes waters evenly does not disturb the Soil.
